fullenrich.name: FullEnrich
fullenrich.short_description: Waterfall contact enrichment tool that aggregates 20+ data sources to find verified emails and phone numbers.

features.description: Aggregates data from 20+ premium providers including Clearbit, Hunter, Wiza, Snov, ContactOut, Anymail Finder, and Crunchbase to maximize find rates.
features.title: Waterfall enrichment

features.description: Advanced phone validation compares number ownership with lead names for US and Canada contacts.
features.title: Phone validation

features.description: Verifies catch-all domain emails, claimed at up to 80% accuracy.
features.title: Catch-all email verification

features.description: Syncs enrichment data with HubSpot and Salesforce.
features.title: CRM sync

features.description: Connects to Claude via MCP and to OpenAI-based workflows, as well as Zapier, Make, n8n, and Clay.
features.title: AI agent integrations

features.description: Programmatic access to waterfall enrichment for building custom workflows.
features.title: API access

pros: Free trial with 50 leads and no credit card required
Aggregates multiple third-party data providers in a single waterfall rather than relying on one source
Claims a bounce rate under 1% on delivered emails
MCP support for connecting directly to Claude
4.8/5 rating on G2
cons: Find rates vary meaningfully by region (77% in US/Canada versus 71-84% elsewhere)
Enterprise-level volume and custom features require contacting sales
Relies on third-party data vendors, so results depend on those providers' underlying coverage

faqs.answer: FullEnrich is a B2B contact enrichment platform that waterfalls over 20 data providers to find and verify email addresses and phone numbers.
faqs.question: What is FullEnrich?

faqs.answer: FullEnrich's Pro plan is €55/month for 1,000 credits, with a free trial of 50 credits and no credit card required.

faqs.answer: Yes, FullEnrich supports Claude via MCP and OpenAI-based workflows, in addition to Zapier, Make, n8n, and Clay.
faqs.question: Does FullEnrich integrate with AI agents?

faqs.answer: FullEnrich states it is SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR and CCPA compliant.
faqs.question: Is FullEnrich compliant with data regulations?
